doc_title: Illinois Forcible Entry and Detainer Act — 5-Day Notice
label: partial
reason: The 5-day notice rule and 735 ILCS 5/9-209 citation are real, but the statute was renamed the Eviction Act in 2017 and the quoted text appears paraphrased with embellishments rather than authentic statutory language.
